name: postdoc-faculty-radar
description: A low-cost career intelligence radar for postdoc, faculty, fellowship, and research roles.

scripts.update: npm run fetch && npm run analyze && npm run build:public
scripts.update:light: npm run fetch && npm run build:public
scripts.refresh:people: npm run import:academic:candidates && npm run import:industry:candidates && npm run discover:academic:ids && npm run discover:academic:orcid && npm run discover:academic:orcid:crosscheck && npm run enrich:academic:orcid -- --reuse-existing && npm run verify:academic:authors
scripts.update:weekly: npm run refresh:people && npm run fetch && npm run analyze && npm run build:public && npm run analyze:academic && npm run build:public && npm run report:weekly && npm run build:public
scripts.update:offline: npm run fetch:offline && npm run analyze && npm run build:public && npm run build:private
scripts.deploy:cloudbase: npx --yes --package @cloudbase/cli@3.6.1 tcb hosting deploy public -e postdoc-d0gag7854778e6b41 --concurrency 4 --retry-count 5 --retry-interval 1000
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run update:offline && npm run validate && npm run verify:acceptance
